name: Solaris (SolarisBank)
description: Banking-as-a-Service API: accounts, cards, KYC, lending for embedded finance.

seo.title: Solaris (SolarisBank) — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Solaris (SolarisBank): Banking-as-a-Service API: accounts, cards, KYC, lending for embedded finance.

when_to_use: BaaS API for embedded banking accounts and KYC in Germany
Card issuance and lending APIs for European neobank products
IBAN account provisioning for fintech consumer apps in Europe

pros: Full BaaS stack: accounts, cards, KYC, lending
BaFin-licensed — skip your own banking license
Good for embedded finance in EU products
cons: Past compliance fines raise partner risk
review.verdict: Powerful EU BaaS if you can survive enterprise onboarding and the regulator spotlight on Solaris.
review.best_for: EU fintechs needing regulated accounts, cards, and lending in one stack
review.not_for: Early-stage startups wanting plug-and-play payment gateway only
